scripts.kill-ports: lsof -ti :8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3032 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.link-worktree-deps: MAIN=$(git worktree list --porcelain | awk '/^worktree/{print $2; exit}'); [ -e node_modules ] || ln -s "$MAIN/node_modules" node_modules; [ -e frontend/node_modules ] || ln -s "$MAIN/frontend/node_modules" frontend/node_modules
scripts.dev: npm run link-worktree-deps && npm run kill-ports && concurrently --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" ".venv/bin/uvicorn backend.api.app:app --reload --port 8000" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
